garmin.title: Garmin Connect
garmin.securityNote: Your Garmin credentials are stored encrypted with AES-256 (Fernet) and are never stored in plain text.
garmin.mfaNote: Your Garmin account has two-factor authentication enabled. Enter the code from your authenticator app or email.

hero.badge: Powered by Claude AI · Jack Daniels VDOT
hero.subtitle: Metriq generates science-backed training plans tailored to your fitness level and Garmin data — and pushes them directly to your watch.

demo.title: See what your plan looks like
demo.subtitle: Click a day to see the workout details. Push workouts directly to your Garmin watch with one tap.
demo.note: This is a sample week from a real AI-generated 10K plan. Your plan will be tailored to your own data.

features.title: Everything you need to train smarter
features.subtitle: Metriq combines AI, sports science and your own data to build plans that actually work.

ai.title: AI-generated training plans
ai.desc: Claude AI analyzes your profile and goals to build a periodized plan based on Jack Daniels VDOT methodology — the gold standard in running science.

garmin.title: Garmin Connect integration
garmin.desc: Sync your activity history for smarter pace targets, and push workouts directly to your Garmin device — with structured intervals and pace zones.

strength.title: Strength training included
strength.desc: Runner-specific strength sessions are woven into your schedule. Choose your location, equipment and focus — from core stability to plyometrics.

calendar.title: Visual training calendar
calendar.desc: See your entire plan at a glance. Every workout shows type, distance, paces and structure. Move, delete or reschedule with ease.

paceZones.title: Personalized pace zones
paceZones.desc: Your VDOT score translates into exact pace ranges for every zone — easy, marathon, threshold, interval and repetition.

bilingual.title: Dutch & English
bilingual.desc: Generate your training plan in Dutch or English. The full app interface is available in both languages and switches instantly.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From profile to personalized plan in under a minute.

step1.title: Enter your profile
step1.desc: Tell Metriq your age, current fitness, target race and preferences. Connect Garmin to automatically pull in your training history.

step2.title: Claude AI builds your plan
step2.desc: Our AI analyses your data and generates a periodized weekly schedule — base, build, peak and taper phases included.

step3.title: Review and customize
step3.desc: View every workout in a clear calendar. Adjust days, move sessions or add strength training to fit your life.

step4.title: Sync to your Garmin
step4.desc: Push any workout or full week to Garmin Connect with a single tap. Structured workouts appear on your watch with guided pace targets.

cta.title: Ready to find your rhythm?
cta.subtitle: Join Metriq and start training with a plan built just for you.
cta.note: No credit card required · Cancel anytime
